knowledge_gaps: A dollar structural weakening cycle has begun following the 2022 peak, following historical 7-10 year phase patterns.
EM currency regime classification (managed vs free float) explains a meaningful portion of the 2-4x P/E valuation gap between comparable EM markets.
Forward guidance credibility erosion contributes an additional 1-2 vol points of FX gamma underpricing beyond carry-driven suppression.
A three-tier currency regime fragmentation is emerging: dollar bloc, CNY-anchored bloc, and freely floating middle tier absorbing adjustment stress.
The PBOC administered FX regime accumulates stored energy: a growing gap between administered and shadow equilibrium rates that eventually produces discontinuous adjustment.
JPY carry trade unwind mechanics and thresholds
Fiscal dominance could bifurcate the Dollar Smile left tail, producing an unprecedented anti-dollar risk-off where the dollar weakens simultaneously with equities during a US-origin fiscal crisis.
The next EM currency crisis will likely originate with a commodity exporter rather than importer, driven by Dutch Disease dynamics and fiscal complacency.
Maturity-dependent correlation bifurcation (2Y-SPX negative, 30Y-SPX slightly positive) means carry unwind hedges using long-end duration will fail asymmetrically. This is a post-2022 phenomenon.
BRICS currency diversification pace and impact
focus.instruction: Build foundational understanding: define core concepts, establish theoretical frameworks, identify key empirical patterns, and map connections to related topics.

monetary_policy.display_name: Monetary Policy Transmission & Central Bank Strategy
